page: Microsoft Azure M128ms is a memory-intensive virtual machine running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 128 vCPUs mapped to 64 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8280M x86_64 processor operating at 2.7 GHz. The system is equipped with 3892.0 GB of RAM, providing approximately 30.41 GB of memory per physical core. Local storage consists of 4194 GB of Premium Storage capable capacity, and there are no integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark results indicate a significant divergence between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics are relatively weak, with stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores falling into the bottom 25% and 10% respectively. However, multi-core performance is strong, as evidenced by the stress-ng multi-core and Passmark CPU scores ranking in the top 25%. Memory bandwidth is a key strength, with large-block read-only bandwidth reaching 375.19 GB/sec, placing it in the top 10% of tested systems. Database and key-value operations are also highly performant, with Redis SET operations achieving 79.29 million operations per second.

Given its massive memory capacity and high multi-core throughput, the M128ms offers high resource density for memory-bound enterprise workloads. The trade-off involves lower single-threaded efficiency and slower text generation speeds in LLM inference tasks. This server is highly suited for large-scale in-memory databases, heavy database operations, static web serving at scale, and memory-intensive enterprise applications that can leverage parallel processing across its 128 vCPUs.
description: The Microsoft Azure M128ms is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an Intel Xeon 8280M processor with 128 vCPUs and 64 physical cores running at 2.7 GHz. It features an exceptionally large memory footprint of 3892.0 GB (approximately 30.41 GB per core) and includes 4194 GB of local storage. While single-core performance and single-threaded compression tasks are relatively weak, the server delivers strong multi-core performance and top-tier memory read bandwidth of 375.19 GB/sec. It excels in parallel processing and high-throughput memory operations, as shown by its 79.29 million Redis SET operations per second. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, large in-memory databases, and high-volume database operations.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M128ms is a memory-optimized server featuring 128 vCPUs, 3892 GB of RAM, and 4194 GB of local storage. It delivers top-tier memory bandwidth and strong multi-core performance for enterprise databases.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure M128ms is a memory-optimized server with 128 vCPUs, 3.8 TB of RAM, and 4.1 TB of storage, built for large-scale database workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory-optimized platform featuring massive RAM capacity and strong multi-core throughput for demanding enterprise database workloads.
bullet_points: 128 vCPUs and 64 physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8280M
3892.0 GB of system memory optimized for in-memory computing
Top-tier large-block memory read bandwidth of 375.19 GB/sec
Strong multi-core performance and high-throughput Redis operations
Suited for large-scale databases and memory-intensive enterprise applications
